Question: Match the term with its definition or example
Answer:
1) Light - a) Form of energy that makes objects visible
2) Transparent - b) Allows light to pass through completely
3) Translucent - c) Allows some light to pass through
4) Opaque - d) Does not allow light to pass through
5) Reflection - e) Bouncing back of light from a surface
6) Mirror - f) Reflects clear images
7) Plane mirror - g) Flat mirror producing virtual, upright images
8) Concave mirror - h) Curved inward mirror, converges light
9) Convex mirror - i) Curved outward mirror, diverges light
10) Shadow - j) Dark area formed when light is blocked
11) Umbra - k) Fully shaded inner part of shadow
12) Penumbra - l) Partially shaded outer region of shadow
13) Refraction - m) Bending of light when passing from one medium to another
14) Lens - n) Transparent object that refracts light
15) Periscope - o) Device using mirrors to see over obstacles
